name: Pocket Bible
description: Clean, focused KJV Bible reader for the M5Stack Cardputer. Easy OT/NT navigation, verse of the day, hymns with full lyrics, topical verses, and the classic About passage. Mostly self-contained; optional SD card for the complete 66-book text and chapter navigation.
keywords: ESP32, Cardputer, bible, KJV, reader, offline
author: 4n6jones-commits
